requirement_topic.en: EDL Grid Connection — 230 V / 400 V / 50 Hz and MEM / EDL Project Approval
requirement_topic.zh: EDL并网接入——230 V / 400 V / 50 Hz及能源矿产部 / EDL项目审批
requirement_topic.zht: EDL併網接入——230 V / 400 V / 50 Hz及能源礦產部 / EDL項目審批

summary.en: Laos operates a 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase, 50 Hz national grid supplied and managed by Electricité du Laos (EDL), the state utility under the Ministry of Energy and Mines (MEM). EDL is one of the largest electricity exporters in Southeast Asia due to Laos' significant hydropower capacity, and the domestic grid is generally well-supplied in urban centres including Vientiane. EV charging infrastructure projects must obtain MEM project licensing and EDL grid-connection approval, including supply capacity review, metering, load management, and commissioning sign-off by EDL engineers. Harmonic injection and power-quality limits follow IEC 61000 series as adopted in Laos' IEC-aligned regulatory context. Public and commercial EV charging installations in Laos are at an early but growing stage, driven by the government's stated EV adoption targets and the Vientiane charging network expansion.
summary.zh: 老挝采用230 V单相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz国家电网，由隶属于能源矿产部（MEM）的国家电力公司（EDL）供电和管理。得益于老挝丰富的水电资源，EDL是东南亚最大的电力出口商之一，万象等城市核心区供电总体稳定。电动汽车充电基础设施项目须取得MEM项目许可和EDL并网审批，包括供电容量审查、计量、负载管理，以及EDL工程师的调试确认。谐波注入和电能质量限值遵循老挝IEC体系监管背景下采用的IEC 61000系列标准。老挝公共和商业电动汽车充电设施处于起步阶段但持续增长，受政府电动汽车采纳目标和万象充电网络扩张推动。
summary.zht: 寮國採用230 V單相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz國家電網，由隸屬於能源礦產部（MEM）的國家電力公司（EDL）供電和管理。得益於寮國豐富的水電資源，EDL是東南亞最大的電力出口商之一，萬象等城市核心區供電總體穩定。電動汽車充電基礎設施項目須取得MEM項目許可和EDL併網審批，包括供電容量審查、計量、負載管理，以及EDL工程師的調試確認。諧波注入和電能質量限值遵循寮國IEC體系監管背景下採用的IEC 61000系列標準。寮國公共和商業電動汽車充電設施處於起步階段但持續增長，受政府電動汽車採納目標和萬象充電網絡擴張推動。

standards_or_laws: Electricité du Laos (EDL) — grid-connection and metering requirements for commercial installations
Ministry of Energy and Mines (MEM) — project licensing for energy infrastructure
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality (adopted in IEC-aligned Laos context)
Lao PDR Electricity Law (amended 2017) — framework for electricity generation, transmission, distribution

summary.en: China domestic charger installations operate on 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz. Laos' 230 V / 400 V supply is within the typical ±10% input-voltage tolerance of most modern EVSE power electronics, so the voltage difference alone is unlikely to require hardware redesign — but exporters must confirm the specific charger's rated input-voltage range covers 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase. Thermal derating for Laos' tropical climate (ambient temperatures regularly reaching 35–40 °C, humidity >80%) differs materially from Northern China design conditions. China domestic grid project acceptance under local DNO requirements does not constitute EDL or MEM approval in Laos.
summary.zh: 中国国内充电桩运行在220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。老挝230 V / 400 V供电通常在大多数现代EVSE电力电子设备±10%输入电压容差范围内，因此电压差距本身不太可能需要硬件重新设计——但出口商须确认具体充电桩额定输入电压范围覆盖230 V单相 / 400 V三相。老挝热带气候（环境温度常达35–40°C，湿度>80%）的热降额设计与中国北方设计条件存在实质差异。中国国内在当地电网项目验收不构成老挝EDL或MEM批准。
summary.zht: 中國國內充電樁運行在220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。寮國230 V / 400 V供電通常在大多數現代EVSE電力電子設備±10%輸入電壓容差範圍內，因此電壓差距本身不太可能需要硬件重新設計——但出口商須確認具體充電樁額定輸入電壓範圍覆蓋230 V單相 / 400 V三相。寮國熱帶氣候（環境溫度常達35–40°C，濕度>80%）的熱降額設計與中國北方設計條件存在實質差異。中國國內在當地電網項目驗收不構成寮國EDL或MEM批准。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements

gap.en: Exporters must confirm: (1) the charger's rated input-voltage range explicitly covers 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz; (2) power electronics and thermal design are reviewed for Laos tropical ambient conditions (35–40 °C ambient, high humidity, potential dust from dry-season wind); (3) MEM project licensing is obtained before installation; (4) EDL grid-connection approval, metering, load calculation, and single-line diagram are prepared and accepted by EDL engineers; (5) harmonic injection compliance with IEC 61000 is documented. Voltage compatibility is likely but must be confirmed per product datasheet; tropical thermal derating is a genuine engineering gap.
gap.zh: 出口商须确认：(1) 充电桩额定输入电压范围明确覆盖230 V单相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz；(2) 电力电子和热设计针对老挝热带环境（35–40°C环境温度、高湿度、旱季扬尘）进行审查；(3) 在安装前取得MEM项目许可；(4) EDL并网审批、计量、负荷计算和单线图由EDL工程师准备并验收；(5) 记录符合IEC 61000的谐波注入合规性。电压兼容性可能满足但须按产品数据表确认；热带热降额是一个实质性工程差距。
gap.zht: 出口商須確認：(1) 充電樁額定輸入電壓範圍明確覆蓋230 V單相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz；(2) 電力電子和熱設計針對寮國熱帶環境（35–40°C環境溫度、高濕度、旱季揚塵）進行審查；(3) 在安裝前取得MEM項目許可；(4) EDL併網審批、計量、負荷計算和單線圖由EDL工程師準備並驗收；(5) 記錄符合IEC 61000的諧波注入合規性。電壓兼容性可能滿足但須按產品數據表確認；熱帶熱降額是一個實質性工程差距。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EDL grid-connection approval and MEM project licensing are required for commercial EV charging installations; voltage and thermal rating confirmation required per EDL engineering review
mandatory_status.cn: China domestic DNO acceptance applies domestically and is not an EDL or MEM substitute; voltage and tropical thermal ratings must be confirmed for Laos conditions

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Laos 230 V / 400 V grid is likely within tolerance of China 220 V / 380 V-rated EVSE, but this must be confirmed per product datasheet. EDL grid-connection approval and MEM project licensing are mandatory for commercial installations. Tropical thermal derating is a genuine engineering gap that must be explicitly addressed.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 老挝230 V / 400 V电网可能在中国220 V / 380 V额定EVSE容差范围内，但须按产品数据表确认。商业安装须强制取得EDL并网审批和MEM项目许可。热带热降额是一个必须明确处理的实质性工程差距。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 寮國230 V / 400 V電網可能在中國220 V / 380 V額定EVSE容差範圍內，但須按產品數據表確認。商業安裝須強制取得EDL併網審批和MEM項目許可。熱帶熱降額是一個必須明確處理的實質性工程差距。
